name: Mihir Sharma
tagline: Dynamic Senior Full-Stack & Mobile Engineer with 5+ years of experience, specializing in architecting and deploying robust web and cross-platform mobile applications that drive product excellence and elevate user experiences.
about: Highly motivated and detail-oriented Senior Software Engineer with over 5 years of professional experience. Expert in architecting, developing, and deploying robust full-stack web and cross-platform mobile applications. Proven ability to transform complex UI/UX designs into high-performance digital solutions, spanning real-time operational hospitality dashboards, corporate healthcare SaaS platforms, and premium luxury e-commerce experiences. Consistently drives product quality, reduces user churn, and enhances interface responsiveness through adherence to modern engineering standards.

projects.name: Zenflow - Clinical Workflow & Provider Management Dashboard
projects.description: Architected a comprehensive healthcare provider management SaaS dashboard to significantly optimize clinical workflow efficiency and practitioner coordination. Engineered a low-latency, dynamic weekly scheduling calendar grid capable of flawlessly coordinating simultaneous multi-practitioner time slots and real-time appointment statuses (Ongoing, Pending, Cancelled). Integrated secure operational metrics tables, modular analytics panels, and comprehensive partner-corporate client views for robust practitioner utilization monitoring.

projects.name: Solitare - Premium Headless E-Commerce Jewelry Platform
projects.description: Developed a highly responsive and visually compelling headless e-commerce interface, tailored for immersive luxury catalog interaction and brand discovery. Implemented advanced localized category filters (Bangles, Necklaces, Rings, etc.), persistent client-side states, high-fidelity item grids, and seamless customer favorites/wishlist functionalities. Optimized modern asset delivery networks and lazy-loading mechanisms, achieving a remarkable 35% improvement in First Contentful Paint (FCP) across high-resolution product showcase nodes.

projects.name: Pizza – Real-Time Hospitality Outlet Management Application
projects.description: Built a tablet-optimized, real-time outlet operations and layout management dashboard designed to minimize operational friction in high-volume dining environments. Engineered an intuitive live floor-plan manager utilizing persistent state updates to accurately map table statuses (Vacant, Occupied, Overdue) with automated alert systems. Established a centralized telemetry pipeline displaying key performance metrics (Average Table Turnaround time and Average Queue Time), successfully lowering seating friction intervals by 18%.

projects.name: Trinity – Personalized Mental Health & Wellness Mobile Application
projects.description: Designed and developed an intuitive, user-centric cross-platform mobile application focused on mental well-being, behavioral habits, and telehealth access. Created a smooth, interactive daily mood journaling module with specialized feedback components and micro-interactions that boosted user retention metrics by 22%. Established secure, encrypted synchronization endpoints for safe user data transmission, self-assessments, and streamlined clinical consultation appointment booking.
